_comment: Maps a Discord username to one or more Dota 2 Steam32 account IDs. Copy this file to players.json and fill in your community's data. Use a string for a single account, or an array for players with multiple Steam accounts. The Steam32 ID is the number in the OpenDota profile URL (https://www.opendota.com/players/<steam32>). Commands like !lastmatch and !roast use the account with the most recent match by default; pass --all (e.g. !lastmatch @user --all) to show every account.
